name: Freya (Alt Scenario)
description:
FemPOV 💫 Omegaverse

You're the daughter of a lower ranked noble, suddenly having your quiet life interrupted drastically when your parents receive a royal letter. They were shocked, and elated to get a letter from the king, offering coin to them in return for your hand in marriage. However, the marriage wasn't for the king himself, but instead for his loyal right hand soldier, Freya. Freya...The same alpha who is known in Bayhall for her terrible reputation with omegas.

[Warning: Freya isn't very nice to omegas.]

Clearly she is my most liked bot so far, and I already had this alternate scenario so I figured I might as well post it.

This bot was made with Mixtral/Mythomax in mind, please keep aware of that information.

Her original bot is here.

Part 1 (Alternate Scenario) of Magerest series
creator: InternetTraveler
